characters.name: ALI
characters.personality: ALI is a determined character whose motives are not yet clear.

dialogue_samples.line: "Alright, gentlemen, I need you to understand the situation. We're experiencing some engine trouble."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue_samples.line: "We're doing everything we can to stabilize the engines. Just stay seated and keep your seatbelts fastened."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, a smug expression on his face.

dialogue_samples.line: "We'll get through this, folks. Just hang on."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of KATRINA, her eyes scanning the passengers.

dialogue_samples.line: "Mayday, Mayday! We're experiencing engine failure! Requesting assistance!"
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

characters.name: SAM
characters.personality: SAM is a determined character whose motives are not yet clear.

dialogue_samples.line: "What's going on? Why are we flying like this?"
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his brow furrowed in concern.
Close-up of KATRINA, her voice calm and soothing.

dialogue_samples.line: "What's happening? Are we going to make it?"
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his voice strained with urgency.

characters.name: LEO
characters.personality: Leo appears to be a worrisome and cautious individual who values predictability and stability, as shown by his repeated mentions of taking the train, suggesting a preference for routine and a concern for safety.
characters.appearance: As a pilot, Leo likely wears a crisp, classic airline uniform, complete with a white shirt, tie, and epaulets, reflecting a sense of professionalism and tradition.
characters.style_reference: 1970s disaster movie, bright colors and sterile airline aesthetics, with a focus on the claustrophobic tension of the airplane cockpit.

dialogue_samples.line: "I told you we should've taken the train."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of SAM, looking anxious.

dialogue_samples.line: "This is ridiculous. We're going to die."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Wide shot of the exterior of the plane, the engines roaring as it shakes and lurches through the air.

dialogue_samples.line: "This is insane. We should've taken the train."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Wide shot of the cockpit, the tension palpable.

characters.name: KATRINA
characters.personality: A no-nonsense, assertive individual who prioritizes safety and order, possibly with a background in aviation or emergency services.
characters.appearance: A mid-to-late century flight attendant, likely wearing a crisp uniform with a neat hairstyle, possibly with a hint of a 1960s or 1970s style.
characters.style_reference: Retro-futuristic, optimistic, and slightly dated, reminiscent of classic disaster movies from the 1950s to the 1970s.

dialogue_samples.line: "Excuse me, gentlemen, but I need to go through the emergency procedures with you."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Wide shot of the cockpit, Ali's hands moving swiftly across the controls.

dialogue_samples.line: "We're going to have to make an emergency landing. Please make sure your seatbelts are securely fastened."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of KATRINA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue_samples.line: "Sir, please remain calm. We're doing everything we can to ensure your safety."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, his face pale with fear.

dialogue_samples.line: "Everyone, please remain seated and keep your seatbelts fastened. We're going to try and land safely."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of SAM, his eyes fixed on Ali.
